pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the business training and consulting services and directing users to key tasks. Provides hero CTA entry points into training, consulting, pricing, booking, and insights.
primary_functions: Summarize core offerings: training, consulting, coaching, and resources
Highlight featured courses, workshops, case studies, and recent articles
Provide prominent calls-to-action for booking a consultation and viewing training options
Route users quickly to Online Courses, Workshops, Consulting, Pricing, Case Studies, and Insights

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit homepage search for a topic such as “leadership fundamentals”
Click "Browse Online Courses" hero button
Click "Training Programs" CTA card in homepage summary
Click "Consulting" summary section or CTA button
Click "View Pricing & Calculator" CTA
Click a featured Technology case study block
Click "Explore remote work insights" from featured articles
Click primary "Book a Session" hero CTA (preselect 1:1 Coaching Session if available)
Click "Meet our leadership consultants" CTA
Click "My Training Plan" quick link (if shown in homepage utility area)
Click "Saved Items" link from homepage shortcuts
Click cart icon in the header

access_methods.description: Accessed via main navigation link "Home"
Users can land directly on the root URL which resolves to index.html

pages.name: Online Courses
pages.description: Listing and detail view for online training courses with search, filters, sorting, and cart actions. Supports browsing and viewing specific course details within the same page using URL parameters.
primary_functions: Browse and search online courses by keyword (e.g., leadership fundamentals)
Filter courses by level, price range, rating, topic, and other attributes
Sort course results by price, rating, or popularity (e.g., Price: Low to High)
View course details (syllabus, instructor, reviews) for a selected course via courseId parameter
Add a selected course to the cart from the course detail view
Return from a course detail back to the filtered and sorted course results while preserving selections

incoming_params.description: Optional. When set to 'detail', the page renders the course detail view; otherwise renders the listing view.
Optional. ID of the course whose details should be displayed when view=detail.
Optional search query string such as 'leadership fundamentals'.
Optional level filter value, e.g., 'beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced', or 'all_levels'.
Optional. Maximum course price filter in numeric currency units (e.g., 100 for $100).
Optional. Minimum average rating filter (e.g., 4 to show courses rated 4.0+).
Optional sort option value, e.g., 'price_asc', 'price_desc', 'rating_desc', 'popularity_desc'.
Optional page number for paginated course result lists.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a course card in the filtered and sorted results list
Click breadcrumb or "Back to results" link from a course detail view
Click cart icon in the header or "View Cart" after adding a course

access_methods.description: Accessed via main navigation link "Online Courses"
Listing and detail state controlled by URL parameters such as view=list|detail and courseId
Linked from featured courses on the Home page and other promotional sections

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart summarizing selected paid offerings such as online courses. Reflects the current single-user cart state managed in localStorage.
primary_functions: Display all items added to the cart, including course titles, prices, and quantities
Allow users to remove courses or adjust quantities where applicable
Show subtotals, discounts (if any), taxes (if applicable), and total cost
Provide actions to continue browsing courses or proceed to a future checkout flow

incoming_params.description: Optional. Indicates originating page (e.g., 'courses') to inform "Continue browsing" behavior.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Continue browsing courses" link from the Cart page

access_methods.description: Accessed via persistent cart icon/link labeled "Cart"
Linked from confirmation toasts/messages after adding courses

pages.name: Consulting Services & Packages
pages.description: Overview of consulting services and directory of consulting packages, including detailed package views. Supports list and detail modes via URL parameters.
primary_functions: Explain consulting focus areas and typical engagement models
List consulting packages with key attributes like audience, monthly price, and included hours
Filter packages by audience (e.g., small_business_1_50), industry, or business size
Sort packages by monthly price, hours included, or popularity (e.g., Monthly Price: Low to High)
Show detailed information for a selected consulting package via packageId parameter
Provide a clear call-to-action from each package detail to start a proposal request on proposal_request.html

incoming_params.description: Optional. 'list' for packages overview, 'detail' for specific package detail.
Optional. ConsultingPackage ID whose details should be displayed when view=detail.
Optional audience filter value such as 'small_business_1_50', 'startup_1_20', etc.
Optional industry filter string (e.g., 'technology').
Optional sort option, e.g., 'monthly_price_asc', 'monthly_price_desc', 'hours_desc', 'popularity_desc'.
Optional page number in a paginated package list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a consulting package card in the filtered list
Click "Request Proposal" on a consulting package detail view

access_methods.description: Accessed via main navigation link "Consulting"
Package detail view controlled via packageId and view=detail in the query string
Linked from Home page consulting summaries and case studies callouts

pages.name: Proposal Request
pages.description: Form to request a proposal or quote for consulting packages or custom training configurations. Consumes context passed from Consulting or Pricing pages.
primary_functions: Display a summary of the selected consulting package or training configuration passed via URL parameters
Collect company information including name, company size (e.g., 2150 employees), and contact details
Capture engagement details such as project goals, scope, and preferred start date via a date picker
Validate required fields, including email and date, before submission
Submit the proposal or quote request and show a confirmation or thank-you message

incoming_params.description: Required. Indicates origin of proposal context: 'consulting_package' or 'custom_training_configuration'.
Optional. ConsultingPackage ID when sourceType='consulting_package'.
Optional. CustomTrainingConfiguration ID when sourceType='custom_training_configuration'.

access_methods.description: Accessed with context parameters from consulting.html or pricing.html to load the correct package or configuration summary
May be bookmarked or opened directly if appropriate sourceType and IDs are present

pages.name: Workshops & Programs
pages.description: Listing and detail view for in-person and other-format workshops and longer programs. Used for building saved training plans and exploring leadership/change-management offerings.
primary_functions: Browse workshops with filters for category (e.g., Leadership, Change Management), format (e.g., in_person), and duration (e.g., 1_day, 2_day)
Sort workshops by rating, date, or price (e.g., Rating: High to Low)
View detailed workshop information for a selected workshop via workshopId parameter, including agenda and outcomes
Save a workshop to the user's Training Plan for later review or planning
Provide navigation back to the filtered and sorted workshop list after viewing a detail

incoming_params.description: Optional. 'list' for workshops overview, 'detail' for a single workshop detail.
Optional. Workshop ID to display when view=detail.
Optional. Comma-separated category filters such as 'leadership,change_management'.
Optional format filter, e.g., 'in_person', 'virtual_live', 'online_self_paced', 'blended'.
Optional. Comma-separated duration filter values like '1_day,2_day'.
Optional sort option, e.g., 'rating_desc', 'next_start_date_asc', 'price_asc'.
Optional current page in paginated workshops list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a workshop card in the filtered and sorted workshops list
Click "Back to Workshops" or breadcrumb from the workshop detail view
Click "View My Training Plan" after saving one or more workshops

access_methods.description: Accessed via main navigation link "Training Programs"
Workshop detail and filter state controlled by query parameters such as workshopId and categories
Linked from Home page and case studies for relevant leadership/change-management offerings

pages.name: My Training Plan
pages.description: User’s saved training plan containing selected workshops and potentially other training items. Provides a planning view with export options.
primary_functions: Display a list of workshops that have been saved to the training plan
Allow users to remove workshops from the plan or adjust basic notes or priorities
Provide links back to individual workshop details on workshops.html with appropriate workshopId
Offer options to export, print, or email the training plan summary for internal review

incoming_params.description: Optional. If provided, visually highlight a specific workshop recently added to the plan.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a workshop title within the training plan

access_methods.description: Accessed via persistent "My Training Plan" link in the header
Linked from confirmation states after saving a workshop from workshops.html

pages.name: Booking
pages.description: Scheduling interface for booking coaching sessions or similar consultations. Supports selecting service, duration, date/time slot, and submitting a booking.
primary_functions: Let users select a service type such as 1:1 Coaching Session from a service dropdown
Allow selection of session duration (e.g., 60 minutes)
Provide a calendar to navigate to specific weeks and choose dates for the appointment
Display available time slots filtered by time of day (e.g., morning 9:0012:00) and allow selection of a slot
Collect user contact information including full name, email, and company or organization
Confirm and submit the booking and display a successful booking confirmation state

incoming_params.description: Optional. Pre-selects a booking service such as '1:1 Coaching Session' when arriving from a CTA.
Optional ISO 8601 date string representing the week to show by default in the calendar.
Optional time-of-day filter, e.g., 'morning', 'afternoon', or 'evening'.
Optional. If set, the page can preselect a specific AvailabilitySlot for confirmation.

access_methods.description: Accessed via main navigation link "Book a Session"
Linked from CTAs on Home, Consulting, and Consultants pages to book a call or coaching session
Optional deep links may specify a preselected service or slot via query parameters

pages.name: Case Studies
pages.description: Listing and detail view for client case studies and success stories. Allows filtering by industry, budget, and duration, and saving items for later.
primary_functions: Browse case studies with filters for industry (e.g., technology), budget range, and project duration
Use sliders or controls to set minimum budget (e.g., 20000) and duration options (e.g., less_than_6_months)
Sort case studies by newest, most impactful, or relevance (e.g., Newest first)
View full case study details via a caseStudyId parameter, including objectives, approach, and results
Save case studies to a favorites list for later review on saved_items.html

incoming_params.description: Optional. CaseStudy ID whose details should be displayed in a detail panel or dedicated view.
Optional industry filter, e.g., 'technology', 'healthcare'.
Optional minimum budget filter value in numeric currency units (e.g., 20000 for $20,000).
Optional maximum budget filter value; may be omitted to represent 'no upper limit'.
Optional project duration filter, e.g., 'less_than_6_months', 'between_6_12_months', 'more_than_12_months'.
Optional sort option, e.g., 'newest_first', 'most_impactful', 'relevance'.
Optional page number within the case studies listing.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a case study card to open its details
Click "View Saved Items" after saving one or more case studies

access_methods.description: Accessed via main navigation link "Case Studies"
Accessed via footer link "Case Studies"
Detail and filtered list state are controlled via query parameters such as caseStudyId and industry

pages.name: Saved Items
pages.description: Central page for viewing and managing saved case studies and other favorited content. Initially focused on case studies.
primary_functions: Display a list of saved case studies with titles, industries, and key metrics
Provide links to open each saved case study’s full details on case_studies.html using caseStudyId
Allow users to remove individual items from the saved list
Optionally group or filter saved items by type if more content types are added in the future

incoming_params.description: Optional. When present, can pre-filter the Saved Items view by type, e.g., 'case_study'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a saved case study title to view its full details

access_methods.description: Accessed via header link "Saved Items"
Linked from save confirmations on the Case Studies page

pages.name: Insights / Blog
pages.description: Blog and insights hub including article listing, detail view, and newsletter subscription. Supports searching, filtering, and subscribing to targeted content streams.
primary_functions: List blog articles with search by keyword (e.g., remote teams) and tag or topic filters (e.g., remote_work)
Sort article results by popularity, recency, or relevance (e.g., Most Popular)
Display full article content via articleId parameter with clear headings and readable layout
Provide an embedded newsletter signup form, accessible from article pages and possibly sidebars
Allow users to specify topics of interest such as remote leadership and team productivity
Let users choose email frequency options such as weekly and submit the subscription form

incoming_params.description: Optional. Article ID whose full content should be displayed.
Optional search query text, e.g., 'remote teams'.
Optional tag/topic filter such as 'remote_work' or 'leadership'.
Optional sort option, e.g., 'most_popular', 'newest_first', 'relevance'.
Optional page number in paginated article results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the third article in the 'remote teams' search results sorted by Most Popular

access_methods.description: Accessed via main navigation link "Insights"
Accessed via footer link "Insights / Blog"
Article detail state is controlled via the articleId query parameter

pages.name: Pricing & Calculator
pages.description: Pricing overview and custom training estimate calculator for on-site and other training formats. Serves as the entry point for configuring custom on-site workshops and sending them to proposal requests.
primary_functions: Present standard pricing tiers and example packages for training and consulting
Offer an interactive pricing calculator for custom training configurations, including delivery format, participant count, and duration
Support selection of on-site or in_house_training formats and workshop lengths (e.g., 2 days)
Allow users to choose add-ons such as follow-up group coaching and set quantities of sessions
Calculate and display an estimated total price based on selected options and update totals on demand
Enable users to add a sub-budget configuration (e.g., under 8000) to a proposal request on proposal_request.html

incoming_params.description: Optional. Pre-selects the delivery format for the calculator, e.g., 'on_site_at_office' or 'in_house_training'.
Optional. Pre-fills number of participants, e.g., 25.
Optional. Pre-fills workshop length in days, e.g., 2.
Optional. Whether to include follow-up group coaching add-on.
Optional. Initial number of follow-up group coaching sessions, e.g., 3.
Optional. Whether to include online pre-work modules.
Optional. Budget limit used for guiding configuration, e.g., 8000.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Add this configuration to Proposal Request" once the estimate is under the specified budget limit

access_methods.description: Accessed via main navigation link "Pricing"
Linked from Home hero and consulting pages when users want custom training pricing
Calculator can be pre-configured via URL query parameters such as deliveryFormat and numParticipants

pages.name: Consultants & Experts
pages.description: Directory and profile view for leadership and consulting experts, including direct contact options. Users can filter, sort, and contact individual consultants.
primary_functions: List consultants with key badges such as expertise areas, region, years of experience, and client logos
Filter consultants by expertise (e.g., leadership_development) and region (e.g., north_america)
Sort consultants by years of experience, name, or relevance (e.g., Experience: High to Low)
Display a consultant’s detailed profile via consultantId parameter, including bio, experience, and clients served
Provide an embedded contact form on the profile for inquiries, including subject and preferred contact method fields
Submit consultant contact requests and display a confirmation state

incoming_params.description: Optional. Consultant ID whose full profile should be shown when viewing a profile.
Optional expertise filter such as 'leadership_development' or 'change_management'.
Optional region filter, e.g., 'north_america', 'europe'.
Optional sort option such as 'experience_desc', 'name_asc', or 'relevance'.
Optional page number in the consultants directory listing.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a consultant card in the directory listing
Click "Request a call" CTA that routes to the general Booking page

access_methods.description: Accessed via main navigation link "Consultants"
Consultant profile view controlled via consultantId query parameter
Linked from About page and home-page consultant highlights

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the company, its mission, and its training and consulting approach. Includes leadership team profiles and impact metrics.
primary_functions: Describe the company’s mission, values, and philosophy toward leadership development and change management
Introduce the leadership team and highlight relevant credentials and certifications
Showcase high-level impact metrics or testimonials from clients

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Meet our consultants" from the leadership/experts section
Click "See our client results" CTA within impact metrics

access_methods.description: Accessed via footer link "About"
May be linked from external sites or profiles directly

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: General contact page for inquiries not tied to a specific service or consultant. Offers a simple form plus core contact channels.
primary_functions: Provide a general-purpose contact form for questions or requests
Display core contact details such as email address, phone number, and mailing address
Offer basic guidance on response times and how different types of inquiries are handled

incoming_params.description: Optional. Pre-selects an inquiry type such as 'sales' or 'general_question' in the contact form.

access_methods.description: Accessed via footer link "Contact"
Linked from email signatures, social media, or other external properties

pages.name: Privacy & Terms
pages.description: Legal information covering privacy practices and terms of service for using the site. May present both Privacy Policy and Terms of Service in a combined or tabbed layout.
primary_functions: Explain how user data, including booking and proposal information, is collected and used
Outline terms of service, including acceptable use and limitations of liability
Provide contact information for privacy-related questions or requests

incoming_params.description: Optional. Specifies which legal document to focus on, e.g., 'privacy', 'terms', or 'combined'.

access_methods.description: Accessed via footer link "Privacy & Terms"
Linked directly from legal or compliance communications
Optional query parameter may target a specific section such as privacy or terms

header_links.description: On-demand and live online training courses
Client success stories and project outcomes
Standard pricing and custom training calculator
Schedule a coaching session or consultation
View saved case studies and other favorites
View courses and items added to cart

footer_links.description: About the company and its mission
General contact information and inquiry form
Privacy policy and terms of service
Read articles and sign up for the newsletter
